title: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs Video Lectures (1986)
summary: 1986年MIT的SICP视频课程在Hacker News上重新引发讨论，获得176分和17条评论。
translated_summary: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs (SICP) video lectures from MIT's 1986 course are being discussed again on Hacker News, with 176 points and 17 comments.
